allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "UP:" $r.Content } catch { Write-Host "Not up yet:" $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell($b = '{"text":"999733","session_id":"otp-test-clean","caller_phone":""}'; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/voice" -Method POST -Body $b -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; $d = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "Response  :" $d.response; Write-Host "Conv state:" $d.conv_state)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "Not ready yet: $_" })

PowerShell(cd "D:\\phonely project\\phonely-airline"; Start-Process -FilePath "python" -ArgumentList "-m", "uvicorn", "main:app", "--host", "0.0.0.0", "--port", "8000", "--reload" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "Server up: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "Not ready: $_" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8; Write-Host "Backend: $\($r.StatusCode\) OK" } catch { Write-Host "Backend not ready: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/app/index.html" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "Frontend: $\($r.StatusCode\) OK" } catch { Write-Host "Frontend error: $_" })
